title: Add logo and hero background image

requirements.summary: Add the uploaded logo image to the Header component in the top-left navigation bar alongside the brand name
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image appears in the Header component at the top-left of the navigation bar
The logo is appropriately sized (height ~40–48px) and does not break the header layout
The logo is visible on both mobile and desktop viewports

file_operations.description: Add an element displaying the logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_200x200.png in the top-left section of the navigation bar, positioned before or alongside the brand name text. Apply appropriate sizing (h-10 or h-12 class) and ensure it displays on both desktop and mobile layouts. Maintain existing scroll-aware styling and navigation functionality.

requirements.summary: Replace the current Hero section background with the uploaded TRI-GITA SERVICES building photo and apply a dark overlay for text legibility
acceptanceCriteria: The TRI-GITA SERVICES building photo is displayed as the full-screen hero background
A semi-transparent dark overlay is applied over the image so headline and CTA text remain clearly readable
The background image covers the full hero section width and height (background-size: cover)
The previous AI illustration background is no longer shown

file_operations.description: Replace the existing background image with frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as the full-screen hero background. Update the background styling to use background-size: cover and background-position: center. Add or modify the dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/50 or bg-navy/60) to ensure the headline, tagline, and CTA buttons remain clearly legible over the new building photo. Remove any references to the previous AI illustration background.
